untranslatable_reason: Signal requires RSI momentum calculation (RSI_t - RSI_t-1 > THRESHOLD) but the allowed operators do not support rate-of-change or delta calculations between current and previous RSI values. The ALLOWED_OPERATORS list does not include subtraction, delta, or momentum operators. Additionally, [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] and [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] days are parameterized placeholders without concrete values, making precise translation impossible.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires momentum/delta calculations (RSI change rate) which are not expressible with the allowed operator set (>, <, >=, <=, ==, crosses_above, crosses_below, is). A proper implementation would need a custom 'rsi_momentum' indicator or subtraction operator support.
